We believe pickleball should be played more often, more confidently, and with zero friction. We’re committed to removing excuses, through better design, better performance, and gear that earns its place on court.  When you’re ready to play, we are too. LUZZ GO!

12 MONTH WARRANTY

We don’t just talk about quality, we guarantee it. Every Luzz Pro paddle is backed by a full 12-month warranty. Because when you build paddles this tough, you can stand behind them without hesitation.

New Arrivals

Latest products

Universally loved paddles

Some things are just universally loved. We teamed up with Universal Pictures to turn iconic characters into high-performance paddles, so whether you channel panda power, minion mayhem, you’re bringing personality and precision to every rally.

FAQs

This is where we cover the stuff people ask us most. Quick, clear, and no fluff. if it’s not? You know where to find us.

Email

1. DO YOU SHIP INTERNATIONALLY?

Yes, we offer worldwide shipping. As long as you can place an order and complete the purchase, we can ship it to you.
2. HOW LONG DOES SHIPPING TAKE?

For detailed shipping times by region, please view our shipping policy: Here
3. WHAT WARRANTY DO YOU OFFER?

We offer a 12-month warranty on all paddles, covering manufacturing defects. For full details: Here
4. HOW TO TRACK MY ORDER?

You can track your order using your order number or tracking number here: Here
5. HOW TO FIND A COURT NEAR ME TO TRY LUZZ?

Use our court finder to locate a nearby pickleball court or partner location: Here
